question: How do I reset my SmartPlug?
answer: Hold the power button for 10 seconds until the light blinks red.

question: Can I plug a space heater into the SmartPlug?
answer: The SmartPlug is rated for up to 15A/1800W. Check your heater's rating before plugging it in.

question: Does the SmartPlug monitor energy usage?
answer: Yes, you can view real-time and historical energy consumption in the SmartHome app under the 'Energy' tab.

question: Why is my SmartPlug blinking blue?
answer: A blinking blue light means the plug is in pairing mode and ready to be connected to Wi-Fi.

question: Will the SmartPlug work during an internet outage?
answer: Schedules saved to the device will continue to run, but you cannot control it remotely via the app without internet.

question: How do I set a timer for my plug?
answer: Open the SmartHome app, select your plug, tap 'Routines', and choose 'Add Timer'.

question: Is the SmartPlug weather-resistant for outdoor use?
answer: No, standard SmartPlugs are for indoor use only. Please purchase our Outdoor SmartPlug for exterior use.

question: Can I group multiple plugs together?
answer: Yes, you can create a 'Room' or 'Group' in the app to control multiple plugs with a single tap.

question: Why does my plug show as 'Offline'?
answer: This usually indicates a weak Wi-Fi signal or a router issue. Try moving it closer to your router.

question: Does it support 5GHz Wi-Fi?
answer: No, SmartHome Pro plugs currently only support 2.4GHz Wi-Fi networks for better range.

question: Does the camera work at night?
answer: Yes, the camera has infrared sensors for night vision up to 30 feet.

question: How long is the video recording saved?
answer: Free accounts save clips for 24 hours. Pro subscribers get 30 days of cloud storage.

question: Is the Smart Camera waterproof?
answer: The Outdoor Camera model is IP65 weather-resistant. The Indoor model is not.

question: How do I share camera access with family?
answer: Go to Settings > Shared Users > Add User, and enter their email address.

question: Why am I getting too many motion alerts?
answer: You can reduce the motion sensitivity slider in the camera settings or set up activity zones.

question: Does the doorbell camera require existing wiring?
answer: The Battery Doorbell does not. The Wired Doorbell requires a 16-24V AC transformer.

question: Can the camera record 24/7?
answer: Yes, if you insert a MicroSD card (up to 128GB) into the camera slot, it supports continuous recording.

question: What is the resolution of the security camera?
answer: All current SmartHome Pro cameras stream and record in 1080p HD.

question: How do I delete old video clips?
answer: In the app, go to the Library tab, tap the 'Edit' icon, select the clips, and press the trash can.

question: Can I turn off the camera's microphone?
answer: Yes, audio recording can be disabled in the device's privacy settings.

question: How do I connect to Wi-Fi?
answer: Use the SmartHome app, tap '+' to add a device, and follow the on-screen instructions to scan the QR code.

question: Do I need the SmartHome Hub for the plugs to work?
answer: No, our Wi-Fi plugs connect directly to your router. The Hub is only required for Zigbee sensors.

question: How do I restart the Hub?
answer: Unplug the Hub from the wall, wait 30 seconds, and plug it back in.

question: What is the maximum number of devices a Hub can support?
answer: A single SmartHome Pro Hub can support up to 64 connected devices.

question: How do I update the firmware?
answer: Firmware updates are automatic. You can manually check by going to Device Settings > Firmware > Check for Updates.

question: Why is my Hub flashing red?
answer: A flashing red light indicates the Hub has lost connection to your internet router.

question: Can I use multiple Hubs in one house?
answer: Yes, for very large homes, adding a second Hub can extend the range of your Zigbee network.

question: Is my data secure?
answer: Yes, all data transmitted between your devices, the Hub, and our cloud is encrypted using AES-256.

question: Can I connect the Hub via Ethernet?
answer: Yes, the Hub has a built-in Ethernet port for a more stable, wired connection to your router.

question: How do I factory reset the Hub?
answer: Press and hold the pinhole reset button on the back of the Hub for 15 seconds.

question: How do I dim the smart bulb?
answer: You can use the brightness slider in the SmartHome app or use a voice command like 'Dim the living room to 50%'.

question: Do the smart bulbs support different colors?
answer: The Color Pro bulbs support 16 million colors. The Standard Pro bulbs only support tunable white.

question: Can I use these bulbs with a physical dimmer switch?
answer: No, using a physical wall dimmer will cause the smart bulb to flicker or disconnect. Keep the wall switch at 100%.

question: How long do the smart bulbs last?
answer: Our LED smart bulbs are rated for 25,000 hours of continuous use.

question: How do I sync my lights to music?
answer: Enable 'Music Sync' in the app settings while your phone is playing audio on the same Wi-Fi network.

question: Why did my lights turn on by themselves?
answer: Check your app's 'Routines' tab. You may have 'Away Mode' or a schedule enabled.

question: What base size are the bulbs?
answer: They fit standard E26 medium base sockets.

question: Can I use smart bulbs outdoors?
answer: Standard bulbs are indoor-only. They must be in an enclosed, weather-proof fixture if used outside.

question: How do I group my kitchen lights?
answer: Go to the Devices tab, tap the '+' icon, select 'Create Group', and choose the lights you want to include.

question: Why is one bulb a different shade of white than the others?
answer: Ensure all bulbs in the group are set to the same color temperature (e.g., 2700K Soft White) in the app.

question: What is the warranty period?
answer: All SmartHome Pro products come with a 2-year limited warranty from the date of purchase.

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: On the login screen of the app, tap 'Forgot Password' and enter your email address to receive a reset link.

question: Does this work with Alexa and Google Assistant?
answer: Yes, you can link your SmartHome Pro account in the Alexa or Google Home apps for voice control.

question: Does it support Apple HomeKit?
answer: Currently, Apple HomeKit is only supported on our Hub V2 and Pro Camera models.

question: How do I contact customer support?
answer: You can reach us 24/7 via the 'Help' section in the app, or by emailing support@smarthomepro.com.

question: Where can I buy replacement parts?
answer: Mounting brackets, cables, and batteries can be purchased directly from our website's accessories store.

question: Is there a monthly fee to use the app?
answer: No, the app and basic device control are completely free. We only charge for optional extended cloud video storage.

question: How do I change my account email?
answer: Log into your account on our website, go to Profile Settings, and select 'Update Email'.

question: Can I transfer my devices to a new owner?
answer: Yes. Delete the devices from your account in the app first. The new owner can then set them up as new.

question: What is your return policy?
answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for products purchased directly from our website.
